- H4: Search ## 2) AFTER OPTIMIZED STRUCTURE - H1: Custom Table Tents for Restaurants and Business Displays - H2: Table Tents Table Material and Paper Options - H2: Table Tents Table Finishing and Coating Choices - H2: Table Tents Table Production Times and Rush Options - H2: Table Tents Table Payment Methods and Processing - H2: Table Tents Table Shipping Guidelines and Methods - H2: Table Tents Table Uses for Restaurants and Marketing - H2: Table Tents Table Artwork Requirements and Design - H2: Professional Table Tents Table Printing Services - H2: Frequently Asked Questions ## 3) PRODUCT HEADER

Custom Table Tents for Restaurants and Business Displays

Professional table tent printing on premium 13.4 pt coverstock paper with your choice of matte or gloss finish. Our custom table tents table solutions feature three popular sizes perfect for restaurant menus, promotional displays, and marketing materials. Digital printing ensures vibrant colors and sharp text for maximum impact at your business location. See also [yard letter and number signs](https://www.banners.com/yard-letter-and-number-signs).

## 4) CONFIGURATOR LABELS - Size Options: 4.25" x 6", 5" x 5", 7" x 5" - Finish: Matte or Gloss - Quantity: 25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000+ - Production Time: 1-5 Business Days ## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB

Table Tents Table Material and Paper Options

Our custom table tents are digitally printed on premium 13.4 pt coverstock paper, providing excellent durability for restaurant and business environments. This heavyweight paper stock ensures your table tent cards maintain their professional appearance through regular handling and display use. Choose from three standard sizes: 4.25" x 6", 5" x 5", and 7" x 5" to accommodate different display needs and table configurations.

Each table tent features precision scoring for easy folding and long-lasting structural integrity. The coverstock material offers superior print quality compared to standard paper options, delivering crisp text and vibrant graphics that enhance your marketing message. Whether you need custom fridge magnets for additional promotional materials or standalone table displays, our printing process ensures consistent quality across your entire order. Perfect for restaurants, cafes, retail locations, and trade show displays where professional presentation matters.

## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

Table Tents Table Finishing and Coating Choices

Select between matte and gloss coating options to achieve the perfect look for your custom table tents table displays. Matte finish provides an elegant, non-reflective surface that's easy to read under various lighting conditions, making it ideal for restaurant environments and professional settings. The matte coating also offers excellent writability if you need to add handwritten specials or notes.

Gloss finish delivers vibrant color saturation and enhanced image sharpness, perfect for promotional materials featuring photographs or bold graphics. The glossy surface provides superior durability and resistance to moisture, fingerprints, and everyday wear. Both coating options maintain the structural integrity of the 13.4 pt coverstock while enhancing the visual appeal of your table tent cards through professional-grade finishing techniques.

## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

Table Tents Table Production Times and Rush Options

Choose from flexible production timeframes ranging from 1 to 5 business days to meet your specific deadline requirements. Priority 1-day production accommodates urgent restaurant menu updates and last-minute promotional campaigns. Express 2-day turnaround provides quick delivery while maintaining competitive pricing for standard orders.

Standard 3-day production offers the best value for most custom table tents table orders, while our 5-day Saver option reduces costs for advance planning situations. Production time begins after artwork approval and file upload completion. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day, with emergency same-day rushes available through customer service consultation for qualifying projects.

## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

Table Tents Table Payment Methods and Processing

All custom table tent orders require payment prior to production to ensure immediate processing once artwork approval is complete. We accept major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for convenient online ordering and secure transaction processing.

Check payments are also accepted and must be received before production begins. Your credit card will only be charged after order approval and artwork confirmation, providing peace of mind throughout the ordering process. This payment structure ensures efficient production scheduling while maintaining transparency in billing procedures for all table tents table orders.

## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

Table Tents Table Shipping Guidelines and Methods

Standard UPS Ground shipping provides 1-3 day delivery to 90% of the United States, with tracking numbers provided once your table tent order ships. Shipping costs are calculated based on package weight and destination, ensuring accurate pricing for all custom table tents table orders regardless of size or quantity.

Expedited shipping options include Two Day, Three Day, Overnight, and UPS Overnight AM services for urgent delivery needs. Large orders may incur additional shipping charges due to weight and packaging requirements. International shipping is available with customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation through USPS and UPS carriers only.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

Table Tents Table Uses for Restaurants and Marketing

Custom table tents excel in restaurant environments for displaying daily specials, wine selections, dessert menus, and promotional offers directly at customer tables. Retail locations utilize these versatile displays for product information, seasonal promotions, and cross-selling opportunities that capture customer attention at point-of-sale locations.

Trade shows and exhibitions benefit from table tent displays for booth information, product specifications, and contact details that remain visible throughout busy events. Office environments use professional table tents for meeting information, departmental announcements, and visitor guidance. The compact size and professional appearance make them ideal for custom car magnets companion pieces in comprehensive marketing campaigns targeting multiple customer touchpoints.

## 11) COMMON USES TAB

Table Tents Table Artwork Requirements and Design

Submit print-ready files in vector formats such as .eps or .ai with fonts converted to outlines for optimal print quality. High-resolution .pdf and .jpg files are also acceptable, with 300 DPI or higher resolution recommended for crisp text and vibrant images on your finished table tent cards.

Our professional graphic design team provides assistance for projects requiring design modifications or complete creation from concept to completion. Color-critical projects benefit from our Color Match Proof System to ensure accurate reproduction of brand colors and specific design elements. File uploads are limited to 60 MB through our online system, with larger files accommodated through customer service coordination.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

Professional Table Tents Table Printing Services

Our digital printing technology delivers consistent, high-quality results for every custom table tents table order, from single pieces to large quantity runs. State-of-the-art equipment ensures accurate color reproduction and sharp detail resolution that maintains professional standards across restaurant, retail, and corporate applications.

Quality control processes include pre-press file review, color calibration, and final inspection before shipping to guarantee customer satisfaction. Our experienced production team handles complex designs, multi-size orders, and rush projects with equal attention to detail. Comprehensive customer support assists with sizing questions, design specifications, and shipping coordination to streamline your ordering experience from concept through delivery of finished products.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Professional table tent printing combines premium materials with advanced digital technology to create marketing displays that enhance your business presentation. Whether promoting restaurant specials, retail products, or corporate information, custom table tents provide an affordable and effective solution for point-of-sale communication that engages customers directly at their decision-making moment.

The durability and professional appearance of our coverstock material ensures your investment delivers long-term value through repeated use and consistent brand representation. From design consultation through final delivery, our comprehensive service approach supports your marketing objectives with truck magnetic signs and other promotional materials for integrated campaigns. Trust our expertise and state-of-the-art production capabilities to transform your marketing vision into impactful table tent displays that drive customer engagement and business results.

## 14) FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

What sizes are available for custom table tent printing?

We offer three standard sizes: 4.25" x 6", 5" x 5", and 7" x 5". These dimensions accommodate various display needs from compact restaurant table settings to larger promotional displays. All sizes feature the same premium 13.4 pt coverstock material and professional finishing options to ensure consistent quality across your order.

What's the difference between matte and gloss table tent finishes?

Matte finish provides a non-reflective surface that's easy to read under any lighting and allows for handwritten additions. Gloss finish offers enhanced color vibrancy and superior durability with moisture resistance, making it ideal for high-traffic environments. Both options maintain the structural integrity of your table tent cards while providing distinct visual presentations.

How thick are the table tent cards and will they stand properly?

Our table tents are printed on 13.4 pt coverstock paper, providing excellent structural stability for reliable standing performance. The heavyweight material includes precision scoring for clean folding and long-lasting durability through regular handling. This thickness ensures your displays maintain their professional appearance throughout extended use in restaurant and business environments.

Can you help design my table tent artwork if I don't have print-ready files?

Yes, our professional graphic design team provides comprehensive design assistance from concept development to print-ready file creation. We can work with your existing logos, text, and images to create effective table tent designs that meet your marketing objectives. Design consultation ensures optimal layout, color selection, and typography for maximum visual impact.

What are the production times for rush table tent orders?

We offer flexible production times from 1 to 5 business days to accommodate various deadline requirements. Priority 1-day production handles urgent orders, while standard 3-day turnaround provides the best value for most projects. Production begins after artwork approval, with emergency same-day rushes available through customer service consultation for qualifying orders.

How are table tent orders shipped and tracked?

Standard UPS Ground shipping provides 1-3 day delivery to most US locations with tracking numbers provided once shipped. Expedited options include Two Day, Overnight, and UPS AM services for urgent delivery needs. International shipping requires customer-provided labels and documentation through USPS or UPS carriers only.
